message:
The other day, I found myself in a classic "I told you so" moment. My neighbor had been teasing me about my go-bag stash for months, saying it was overkill. But then, as luck would have it, we had a surprise power outage that left the whole neighborhood in the dark. I pulled out my trusty flashlight and snacks, while my neighbor was rummaging through his drawers looking for candles. I couldn’t help but smile as I offered him some granola bars and a glow stick. 

It was a great reminder that being prepared isn’t just about being cautious; it’s about being ready to share and help others when unexpected moments arise. If you're curious about what to pack in your own go-bag, this little refresher helped me fine-tune mine! What’s one item you can’t live without in your emergency kit?
